synopsis: Han, Luke, Leia, Chewie, Lando, C3PO [sic] and R2-D2 are up to their ears in Ewoks and trouble when war breaks out between the Ewoks and Lahsbees! "Small Wars" written by Jo Duffy and premiering the work of the new STAR WARS penciler, Cynthia Martin! Inked by Tom Palmer.
title: Star Wars (1977) #94: Small Wars
